entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 1
entries.excerpt: “In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth” (Gen 1:1) — that is, the substance of heaven and the substance of earth. No one should think that the six-day creation is an allegory. Neither is it permissible to say that what is described as created in the course of six days was in fact created in a single instant, nor that the descriptions are mere names — either signifying nothing or signifying something else.…
